queries.feature_definition: Checking account status: no checking account.
queries.question: Empirical analysis of the risk mitigation effects associated with the absence of a primary checking account on credit default probability.
Determinants of default: empirical investigation into how education loan purposes contribute to elevated credit risk profiles.

queries.feature_definition: Credit history: critical account or other existing credits.
queries.question: Credit risk drivers: empirical assessment of the risk reduction mechanisms linked to critical or diversified existing credit histories.
